shots.title: Player identification + per-player handicaps
shots.notes: Added optional player field to GolfScorecard, created player.ts (extractPlayers, filterScorecardsByPlayer, computePlayerHandicaps, computePlayerHandicap). Added team config to SlopeConfig, NO_PLAYER validation warning. CLI --player and --team flags on card command. 17 new tests.

shots.title: Shared hazard indices with multi-reporter severity
shots.notes: Added reported_by to RecurringPattern, created computeReporterSeverity (1→low, 2→medium, 3+→high), mergeHazardIndices (union sprints, accumulate reporters), filterHazardsByVisibility. Briefing shows [N reporters] tag. CLI --player/--personal flags on briefing. 18 new tests.

shots.title: Team leaderboard + dashboard integration
shots.notes: Created leaderboard.ts (buildLeaderboard, formatLeaderboard, renderLeaderboardHtml). Dashboard conditionally renders leaderboard when >1 player. Added /api/leaderboard route and --player flag to dashboard CLI. 13 new tests.

shots.title: Documentation + onboarding
shots.notes: Added --team flag to init command. Updated CLI help with new flags and examples. Created docs/guides/multi-developer.md. Updated backlog README. Registered 6 new functions in MCP registry (extractPlayers, filterScorecardsByPlayer, computePlayerHandicaps, buildLeaderboard, computeReporterSeverity, mergeHazardIndices).

conditions.description: Multi-package schema change — optional player field on GolfScorecard ripples through validation, briefing, dashboard, and CLI. Filter-before-compute architecture avoided threading player through existing functions.

nutrition.description: Clean build + typecheck + all 1002 tests pass (768 core + 36 store + 144 CLI + 54 MCP) after each commit
3 focused commits matching execution order (S20-1 first, S20-2+S20-3 parallel, S20-4 last). Build/test/typecheck before each commit.

Filter-before-compute: existing computeHandicapCard, buildReportData, generateDashboardHtml all unchanged — player filtering happens before they're called. Zero modifications to computation functions.
All existing 955 tests pass unchanged (2 validation tests updated for NO_PLAYER warning). 47 new tests added. Zero regressions — scorecards without player field work identically.

nineteenth_hole.how_did_it_feel: Clean. The filter-before-compute architecture made this surprisingly simple — most of the sprint was writing new leaf-node modules (player.ts, leaderboard.ts) that compose existing functions, not modifying existing ones. The existing test suite caught the NO_PLAYER warning impact immediately.
nineteenth_hole.advice_for_next_player: All optional fields use ?? DEFAULT_PLAYER fallback. Scorecards without player field continue to work identically. Leaderboard auto-hides on dashboard when only 1 player. The --team flag on card is for multi-developer comparison (across sprints), while --swarm is for multi-agent analysis (within sprints). MCP sandbox picks up new exports automatically via ...core spread.
nineteenth_hole.what_surprised_you: How little existing code needed changing. Only 2 existing tests needed updates (validation tests expected 0 warnings, now there's NO_PLAYER). The briefing.ts change was 2 lines — one for the reported_by type field, one for the [N reporters] tag. Dashboard integration was 7 lines (import + conditional render).
nineteenth_hole.excited_about_next: Team leaderboard + per-player handicaps unlock competitive/collaborative workflows. The reported_by field on RecurringPattern enables team-wide hazard intelligence — patterns reported by 3+ developers are clearly systemic. The /api/leaderboard endpoint could feed team dashboards or Slack integrations.

packages/core/src/leaderboard.ts: New file — buildLeaderboard, formatLeaderboard, renderLeaderboardHtml
packages/core/src/config.ts: Added team config (players, defaultPlayer) to SlopeConfig
packages/core/src/validation.ts: NO_PLAYER warning for scorecards without player field
packages/core/src/briefing.ts: reported_by on RecurringPattern, [N reporters] tag in formatBriefing
packages/core/src/dashboard.ts: Conditional leaderboard section when >1 player
packages/cli/src/commands/briefing.ts: --player and --personal flags with hazard visibility filtering

course_management_notes: 4 tickets, 4 in_the_hole — zero hazards, zero penalties, birdie
Filter-before-compute: zero modifications to existing computation functions (computeHandicapCard, buildReportData, generateDashboardHtml)
All fields optional with backward-compatible fallbacks (?? DEFAULT_PLAYER, reported_by ?? [])
47 new tests: 31 player, 4 briefing, 13 leaderboard. Total test count: 1002
